title: Chapter 11 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)

{{Quote|Anakin continues his pursuit of Dark Jedi Asajj Ventress, disobeying Obi-Wan's strenuous orders not to do so. During an intense dogfight, he tracks her through hyperspace to Yavin 4. Obi-Wan Kenobi, who is acting as a General of the Army of the Republic, dispatches a platoon of ARC troopers to support his Padawan.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/11.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Eleven (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 11'''" is the eleventh episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, the first episode in [[Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]], and the eleventh episode in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[March 26]], [[2004]].

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and the mystery [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|''Ginivex''-class starfighter]] fly head-to-head, firing their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. Skywalker scores a hit, but his opponent also manages to damage his [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. The [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] ship plunges into the atmosphere of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], with Skywalker in hot pursuit. Skywalker chases the semi-circular ship through the streets of [[Harnaidan]]. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] recognizes Skywalker's ship as they fly overhead, and activates his communicator.

Skywalker assures him the situation is under control. Kenobi reprimands his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], reminding him that his place is in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] with his [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], not chasing a single ship through the streets. Skywalker protests that this is no ordinary pilot—[[The Force/Legends|the Force]] is strong with them. The mystery ship, piloted by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], shoots back into space. Kenobi orders Skywalker not to follow, but the willful Jedi disobeys his master and follows the ship into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. A furious Kenobi orders a squadron of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to follow them.
